tools.name: list_buzzwords
tools.description: List all tech/tool buzzwords in the moja.work glossary as {id, label, category}. Optional category filter (e.g. framework, language, tooling, design, os).

tools.name: get_buzzword
tools.description: Get the full glossary entry (plain text) for one buzzword by its id.

tools.name: search_buzzwords
tools.description: Full-text search across the buzzword glossary; returns matching entries with a snippet.

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List the DIY / design projects showcased on moja.work as {id, headline, intro}. Includes each project intro so no per-project follow-up call is needed.

tools.name: get_project
tools.description: Get a project intro (plain text) plus its image URLs by project id.

tools.name: get_timeline
tools.description: Get the professional career timeline / CV of Markus Lungwitz (stations with descriptions and keywords).

tools.name: get_epos
tools.description: Get "The Chronicle of the Three Realms" — the epic retelling of the moja.work git history — as an ordered list of sections {anker, headline, url, text}. Optional `anker` returns a single section (e.g. intro, prologue, canto-01, epilogue).

tools.name: get_contact
tools.description: Get public contact details / vCard (name, email, phone, url, avatar, QR code).

tools.name: get_references
tools.description: Get external design references (Behance projects) as {id, name, url, fields, cover}.

tools.name: list_youtube_playlists
tools.description: List the public YouTube playlists of the moja.work channel as {id, title, description, thumbnail, itemCount, publishedAt}.

tools.name: get_youtube_playlist
tools.description: Get one YouTube playlist of the moja.work channel by id, including its videos with full descriptions {id, title, description, thumbnail, publishedAt, position}.

tools.name: list_docs
tools.description: List the auto-generated code documentation sets (Compodoc) for the moja-work monorepo, with their URLs.

tools.name: get_docs
tools.description: Get the LLM-friendly code documentation (Compodoc llm-md export) for one project of the monorepo. Can be large.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_project, get_epos, get_contact, get_references, list_docs · Private data: get_contact · Public sink: get_contact.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_project, get_epos, get_contact, get_references, list_docs · Private data: get_contact · Public sink: get_contact

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
